name: Macro Terminal (4-file build)
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y ninja-build libgl1-mesa-dev libx11-dev libxrandr-dev libxi-dev libxinerama-dev libxcursor-dev libcurl4-openssl-dev libssl-dev xvfb gcc-13 g++-13 && sudo update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/gcc gcc /usr/bin/gcc-13 100 --slave /usr/bin/g++ g++ /usr/bin/g++-13 && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/microsoft/vcpkg.git /usr/local/vcpkg && sudo /usr/local/vcpkg/bootstrap-vcpkg.sh -disableMetrics && sudo chmod -R 777 /usr/local/vcpkg
